name: Black Widow
description: Natalia Alianovna Romanova, trained from childhood in the Red Room, the Soviet program that produced the deadliest female operatives in the world. Defecting to S.H.I.E.L.D. under the guidance of Clint Barton, she became one of the founding Avengers. A master of espionage, hand-to-hand combat, and psychological manipulation, Black Widow compensates for her lack of superhuman abilities with unparalleled skill and tactical intelligence. She sacrificed her life on Vormir to obtain the Soul Stone.
